notes: ArabicssSoftphone H_19 (optional update): Accounts now correctly show your saved Outbound Routing Trunk (Trunk 8/9) when you open an account to edit it. The incoming Ringer now boots OFF by default (re-enable any time in Settings > Telephony). This update is dismissible - click 'Later' to keep working; you'll be reminded on the next launch. Your saved accounts are preserved.
